findings.detail: Does NOT import from orchestration (glue layer) — confirmed via grep. Imports under TYPE_CHECKING: MarketMindConfig. Lazy imports inside function body: gateway/async_client, storage/archivist, shadows (shadow_state, shadow_mother, expert_shadows, daredevil_shadows, catfish_agent, background_scheduler, shadow_memory), gateway/multimodal_adapter, pipeline (scout, flash_triage, flash_preprocessor, investigation_loop). All imports follow glue → module direction. No back-imports or sibling-sibling imports.

Returns dict with 9 stable keys: tracker, archivist, session_date, shadow_db, mother, news_items, triage_results, hypotheses, actionable. Each key has a consistent type across all code paths: tracker=_StageTracker, archivist=Archivist, session_date=str (ISO date), shadow_db=ShadowStateDB|None, mother=ShadowMother|None, news_items=list[NewsItem], triage_results=list (FlashSignal or TriageResult), hypotheses=list[HypothesisResult], actionable=list[HypothesisResult]. The shadow_db/mother keys are None when shadows disabled — consumer must handle None.

Stages 0→1→2→3 sequential: Shadow init → Scout → Flash triage → Investigation. Each stage depends on prior outputs (shadow_db for mother, news_items for triage, triage_results/browse_candidates for investigation). Correct dependency chain with no circular references.

Function signature: async def run_pre_gate1(config, mock=False, verbose=False, shadow_count=None) → dict. Config parameter unchanged (MarketMindConfig). Optional params match orchestration convention (mock, verbose, shadow_count). Returns dict — no breaking changes vs the _run_stages_0_3 private function it replaced.

Sequential pipeline with no while loops or recursion. Each stage calls → returns → next stage. If shadow_count is 0 or shadows_enabled is False, Stage 0 is entirely skipped (line 56). No infinite loop risk.

ImportError at Stage 2 (flash_triage) degrades to flash_preprocessor (still produces triage_results). ImportError at Stage 3 (investigation_loop) skips investigation (returns empty lists for hypotheses/actionable/monitor/priced_in). Both degradations preserve the output contract — all 9 dict keys are still populated. Archive failures silently caught — never propagate.

notes: Clean extraction from orchestration.py with well-defined 9-key dict contract. Lazy imports inside function body to avoid circular import issues at module load time. Two graceful degradation paths (flash_triage → flash_preprocessor, investigation_loop → skip) preserve the output contract in all code paths. The shadow_db/mother keys are None when shadows disabled — post_gate1.py checks for None before using them.
